channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: जा घट प्रेम न संचरे, सो घट जान मसान । जैसे खाल लुहार की, सांस लेत बिनु प्रान ॥
item.description:
Meaning: A heart without love is like a cremation ground. Like the blacksmith's bellows, it breathes without life.

Translation: A heart without love is a graveyard. It breathes like bellows, but has no life.
item.guid: जा घट प्रेम न संचरे, सो घट जान मसान । जैसे खाल लुहार की, सांस लेत बिनु प्रान ॥493469

item.title: कहता हूँ कहि जात हूँ, कहूँ जो ठोक बजाय । कुआँ पास है आपणे, तू क्यों प्यासा जाय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: I say it again and again, and I say it with certainty. The well is near you; why do you remain thirsty?

Translation: I tell you truly, the well is right here. Why do you still wander with thirst?
item.guid: कहता हूँ कहि जात हूँ, कहूँ जो ठोक बजाय । कुआँ पास है आपणे, तू क्यों प्यासा जाय ॥493470

item.title: साधु शब्द समुद्र है, जामें रत्न अपार । मूरख भेद न जानहीं, ढूँढत फिरे किनार ॥
item.description:
Meaning: The words of a saint are an ocean filled with gems. Fools don't know the secret and look only on the shore.

Translation: A saint's word is an ocean of gems. Fools know not the secret and stay on the shore.
item.guid: साधु शब्द समुद्र है, जामें रत्न अपार । मूरख भेद न जानहीं, ढूँढत फिरे किनार ॥493471
